get.description: Health-check endpoint returning a simple ok response.

post.description:
Register a new user, create a default tenant and return auth tokens.

Args:
    payload: SignupIn input schema with email, password and optional name.
    db: Async DB session.

Returns:
    TokenOut containing an access token and (in test mode) a refresh token.

Raises:
    HTTPException 400 when email already exists.

Authenticate a user and issue access/refresh tokens.

Args:
    payload: LoginIn schema with email and password.
    db: Async DB session.

Returns:
    TokenOut containing access token and optional refresh token (in test mode).

Raises:
    HTTPException 401 when credentials are invalid.

Rotate a refresh token and issue a new access token.

Args:
    refresh_token: Opaque refresh token string presented by the client.
    db: Async DB session.

Returns:
    TokenOut containing new access token and (in test mode) the new refresh token.

Raises:
    HTTPException 401 when the refresh token is invalid or expired.

Revoke a refresh token to log a user out.

Args:
    refresh_token: Opaque refresh token to revoke.
    db: Async DB session.

Returns:
    Dict indicating operation success.

Create an invite record for a tenant (placeholder implementation).

Notes:
    This is a simplified flow that does not enforce membership/role checks.
    In production use, wire get_current_user and require_membership to verify permissions.

Args:
    tenant_id: Tenant identifier to invite into.
    payload: InviteCreate schema with invitee email and role.
    db: Async DB session.

Returns:
    A small hint of the invite token that was generated.

Create a new tenant and grant owner membership to the creator.

Args:
    payload: TenantCreate input schema with the tenant name.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user (will become tenant owner).

Returns:
    The created Tenant object.

get.description:
List tenants the current user is an active member of.

Args:
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    List of Tenant objects the user is a member of.

Retrieve a tenant by id if the requester is an active member.

Args:
    tenant_id: UUID of the tenant to retrieve.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    The Tenant object when the user is an active member.

Raises:
    HTTPException 403 when the user is not a member.
    HTTPException 404 when the tenant does not exist.

patch.description:
Update tenant properties; only owners may perform this action.

Args:
    tenant_id: UUID of the tenant to update.
    payload: TenantUpdate schema with changes.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user; must be OWNER.

Returns:
    The updated Tenant object.

Raises:
    HTTPException 403 when the user is not the owner.
    HTTPException 404 when the tenant does not exist.

delete.description:
Delete a tenant. Only owners can delete their tenant.

Args:
    tenant_id: UUID of the tenant to delete.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user; must be OWNER.

Raises:
    HTTPException 403 when the user is not the owner.
    HTTPException 404 when the tenant does not exist.

post.description:
Issue a new access token with the requested tenant_id after validating membership.

Returns:
    {"access_token": "<jwt>"}
Raises:
    403 if user is not an active member of the requested tenant.
    404 if tenant not found.

schema.title: Response Switch Active Tenant Tenants  Tenant Id  Switch Post

post.description: Create a membership or invite for a tenant. Only tenant owners may invite.

get.description: List all memberships for a tenant. Requester must be an active member.

schema.title: Response List Members For Tenant Tenants  Tenant Id  Members Get

patch.description: Update membership properties such as role or status. Only tenant owners may update.

delete.description: Delete a membership. Only tenant owners may delete memberships.

post.description:
Create a new account owned by the authenticated user.

Args:
    payload: AccountCreate schema with account properties.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    The created Account instance.

get.description:
List accounts belonging to the user and accounts shared with their families (tenants).

Args:
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    List of serialized account dicts (balance masked according to visibility rules).

Get a single account by id and serialize according to requestor privileges.

Args:
    account_id: UUID of the account.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    Serialized account dict (balance may be masked).

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when account does not exist.

patch.description:
Update account fields. Only the account owner may modify.

Args:
    account_id: UUID of the account to update.
    payload: AccountUpdate schema with optional fields.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    The updated Account instance.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when account is not found.
    HTTPException 403 when requester is not the owner.

delete.description:
Delete an account. Only the account owner may delete their account.

Args:
    account_id: UUID of the account to delete.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when account does not exist.
    HTTPException 403 when requester is not the owner.

get.description:
Return shares for a given account; only the account owner may view shares.

Args:
    account_id: UUID of the account.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    List of AccountShare records for the account.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when account not found.
    HTTPException 403 when requester is not the owner.

schema.title: Response Get Account Shares Accounts  Account Id  Shares Get

post.description:
Create an AccountShare linking an account to a tenant (family).

The account owner may grant visibility to another tenant.

patch.description: Update properties of an account share identified by tenant_id. Only account owner can modify.

delete.description: Delete an account share identified by tenant_id. Only the account owner may delete.

post.description:
Create a new category within the active tenant.

Tenant and membership are derived from the access token via
`get_active_context`. Mutation operations require the requester to be
an OWNER of the tenant (enforced via the active membership role).

get.description:
List categories for the active tenant.

No additional membership lookup is required because `get_active_context`
already validated the membership and returned the active tenant.
Retrieve a category by id if it belongs to the active tenant.

patch.description:
Update an existing category within the active tenant.

Only OWNERs may perform mutations.

delete.description: Delete a category if it belongs to the active tenant and the user is an OWNER.

post.description:
Create a transaction within a tenant.

Args:
    payload: TransactionCreate schema containing tenant and account context and amounts.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user creating the transaction.

Returns:
    The created Transaction record.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when the account does not exist.
    HTTPException 403 when the user is not an active member of the tenant.

get.description:
List transactions for a tenant with optional filtering.

Args:
    start: Optional start date to filter transactions (inclusive).
    end: Optional end date to filter transactions (inclusive).
    category_id: Optional category id to filter by.
    account_id: Optional account id to filter by.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    List of Transaction records matching the filters and tenant context.

Raises:
    HTTPException 403 when the user is not a member of the requested tenant.

Retrieve a single transaction if the requester belongs to the same tenant.

Args:
    transaction_id: UUID of the transaction.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    The Transaction record when permitted.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when transaction not found.
    HTTPException 403 when user is not a member of the transaction's tenant.

patch.description:
Update a transaction. Only the creator may modify their transaction.

Args:
    transaction_id: UUID of the transaction to update.
    payload: TransactionUpdate schema with optional fields.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Returns:
    The updated Transaction record.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when transaction not found.
    HTTPException 403 when requester is not the creator.

delete.description:
Delete a transaction. Only the creator may delete their transaction.

Args:
    transaction_id: UUID of the transaction to delete.
    db: Async DB session.
    user: Current authenticated user.

Raises:
    HTTPException 404 when transaction not found.
    HTTPException 403 when requester is not the creator.

AccountCreate.title: AccountCreate
AccountCreate.description:
Input schema to create an account.

Args:
    name: Account name.
    type: Account type.
    currency: Optional currency (defaults to BRL).
    balance: Optional starting balance.

AccountRead.title: AccountRead
AccountRead.description:
Read schema for account data returned by the API.

Attributes:
    id: Account identifier.
    user_id: Owner user id.
    name: Account name.
    type: Account type.
    currency: Currency code.
    balance: Monetary balance or None when masked.
    created_at: Creation timestamp.
    updated_at: Last update timestamp.

AccountShareCreate.title: AccountShareCreate
AccountShareCreate.description:
Input schema to create an account share granting access to a tenant.

When creating via the account-scoped endpoint (/accounts/{account_id}/shares)
the account_id may be omitted from the body and will be derived from the
path parameter. For the deprecated global /account_shares endpoint the
account_id may be supplied in the payload.

Args:
    account_id: Optional account to share (may be provided or omitted).
    tenant_id: Tenant receiving the share.
    visibility: Visibility of the shared balance.

AccountShareRead.title: AccountShareRead
AccountShareRead.description:
Read schema for account share data returned by the API.

Attributes:
    id: Share id.
    account_id: Shared account id.
    tenant_id: Tenant receiving the share.
    visibility: Visibility setting for the share.
    granted_by: User that granted the share.
    granted_at: Timestamp when the share was granted.

AccountShareUpdate.title: AccountShareUpdate
AccountShareUpdate.description:
Input schema for updating an account share.

Args:
    visibility: New visibility setting (optional).

AccountType.title: AccountType
AccountType.description:
Type of a financial account, affecting expected behavior and balance handling.

CASH: cash-like accounts, DEBIT: bank/debit accounts, CREDIT: credit card accounts.

AccountUpdate.title: AccountUpdate
AccountUpdate.description:
Input schema for updating an account.

Args:
    name: New account name.
    type: New account type.
    currency: New currency code.
    balance: New balance value.

CategoryCreate.title: CategoryCreate
CategoryCreate.description:
Input schema to create a category.

Args:
    name: Category name.
    kind: Category kind (expense/income).
    parent_id: Optional parent category id.

CategoryKind.title: CategoryKind
CategoryKind.description:
Kind of category indicating whether it represents an expense or income.

Used to classify categories and transactions as either costs (expense)
or earnings (income).

CategoryRead.title: CategoryRead
CategoryRead.description:
Read schema returning category data.

Attributes:
    id: Category id.
    tenant_id: Tenant id.
    name: Category name.
    kind: Category kind.
    parent_id: Optional parent id.
    created_at: Creation timestamp.
    updated_at: Last update timestamp.

CategoryUpdate.title: CategoryUpdate
CategoryUpdate.description:
Input schema for updating a category.

Args:
    name: New name (optional).
    kind: New kind (optional).
    parent_id: New parent id (optional).

Currency.title: Currency
Currency.description: Supported currency codes used for monetary fields across the models.

InviteCreate.title: InviteCreate
InviteCreate.description:
Input schema to create an invite for a tenant.

Args:
    email: Email address to invite.
    role: Role to assign when the invite is accepted.

LoginIn.title: LoginIn
LoginIn.description:
Input schema for user login.

Args:
    email: User email address.
    password: Plaintext password.
    tenant_uuid (Option): specify a tenant to login

MembershipCreate.title: MembershipCreate
MembershipCreate.description:
Input schema to create a membership or invite within a tenant.
Tenant ID is derived from the active context within the access_token

Args:
    user_email: Email of the user to invite or add.
    role: Role to assign to the membership.

MembershipRead.title: MembershipRead
MembershipRead.description:
Read schema returning membership details.
Tenant ID is derived from the active context within the access_token

Attributes:
    id: Membership identifier.
    tenant_id: Tenant the membership belongs to.
    user_id: Optional linked user id.
    user_email: Optional invite email.
    role: Assigned role.
    status: Membership status.
    created_at: Creation timestamp.

MembershipRole.title: MembershipRole
MembershipRole.description:
Role assigned to a membership within a tenant.

OWNER has full control, MEMBER has standard access, VIEWER has read-only access.

MembershipStatus.title: MembershipStatus
MembershipStatus.description:
Lifecycle status for a membership or invite.

ACTIVE: membership is active and usable.
PENDING: invite sent or awaiting acceptance.
REVOKED: membership or invite has been revoked.

MembershipUpdate.title: MembershipUpdate
MembershipUpdate.description:
Input schema for updating membership properties.
Tenant ID is derived from the active context within the access_token
memebrhsip Id is derived from the path param

Args:
    role: New role (optional).
    status: New status (optional).

ShareVisibility.title: ShareVisibility
ShareVisibility.description: Controls whether an account's balance is visible to a membership.

SignupIn.title: SignupIn
SignupIn.description:
Input schema for user signup.

Args:
    email: User email address used for login.
    password: Plaintext password provided by the user (will be hashed).
    name: Optional display name.

TenantCreate.title: TenantCreate
TenantCreate.description:
Input schema to create a new tenant.

Args:
    name: Human-readable name for the tenant.

TenantRead.title: TenantRead
TenantRead.description:
Read schema for tenant information returned by the API.

Attributes:
    id: Tenant identifier.
    name: Tenant name.
    created_at: Creation timestamp.

TenantUpdate.title: TenantUpdate
TenantUpdate.description:
Input schema for updating a tenant's properties.

Args:
    name: New name for the tenant (optional).

TokenOut.title: TokenOut
TokenOut.description:
Output schema for authentication tokens.

Attributes:
    access_token: JWT access token string.
    token_type: Type of token (default: 'bearer').
    refresh_token: Optional opaque refresh token (only present in tests).

TransactionCreate.title: TransactionCreate
TransactionCreate.description:
Input schema to create a transaction.

Args:
    account_id: Account to which the transaction belongs.
    category_id: Optional category classification.
    amount: Monetary amount.
    currency: Currency code (defaults to BRL).
    transaction_date: Date when the transaction occurred.
    transaction_type: Expense or income (CategoryKind).
    description: Optional text describing the transaction.
    source: Optional transaction source.

tenant_id is derived from the active context (access token).

TransactionRead.title: TransactionRead
TransactionRead.description:
Read schema returning transaction details.

Attributes:
    id: Transaction id.
    tenant_id: Tenant id.
    account_id: Account id.
    category_id: Optional category id.
    amount: Monetary amount.
    currency: Currency code.
    transaction_date: Date of transaction.
    transaction_type: Expense or income.
    description: Optional text description.
    created_by: User who created it.
    created_at: Creation timestamp.
    updated_at: Last update timestamp.
    reconciled: Reconciliation flag.
    source: Transaction source.

TransactionSource.title: TransactionSource
TransactionSource.description:
Source of a transaction describing how it was created.

MANUAL: created by a user interaction.
RECURRING: generated by a scheduled/recurring process.

TransactionUpdate.title: TransactionUpdate
TransactionUpdate.description:
Input schema for updating transactions.

Args:
    category_id: New category id (optional).
    amount: New amount (optional).
    currency: New currency (optional).
    transaction_date: New date (optional).
    transaction_type: New type (optional).
    description: New description (optional).
    reconciled: Updated reconciliation flag (optional).
